Comment: Operator-tier verbs: Go/CLI-only by design — the operator Bearer must never enter browser JS. Both drift guards enforce this manifest: drift_test.go requires every shape here to be fixture-guarded in shapeCtors; drift.test.ts requires that NO client binding exists (no AmpWebClient method named per Verb, no admin Endpoint string in client source). Adding a TS binding for one of these verbs therefore forces a reviewed edit of this file.
